title: Repealed by Acts 2025, No. 411, §3.
doc_html:
§2153.1 Repealed by Acts 2025, No. 411, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 2026.

NOTE: R.S. 47:2153.1 enacted by Acts 2024, No. 774, eff. Jan. 1, 2026, and repealed by Acts 2025, No. 411, eff. Jan. 1, 2026.
